data.description:
Rec 4 policy half of session-logs/2026-06-09-architecture-review.md (risk R3). Codify the unit-size policy that balances agent-editability against fragmentation: target 200-500 LOC per unit, soft cap 800; split ONLY along call-graph seams that already exist (a unit = one cohesive responsibility an agent can load whole); never create files <100 LOC by splitting; prefer deleting bash via the strangler-fig migration over splitting bash.

Work: write the policy into CLAUDE.md (agent guide) + docs/architecture.md; optionally add a soft CI check (warn-only wc -l report on src/) so drift is visible without blocking.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Policy text in CLAUDE.md and docs/architecture.md with the anti-fragmentation rules
- [ ] Current offenders enumerated with their planned remedy (split ticket vs migration tier)
- [ ] Optional warn-only size report wired into CI
data.title: Adopt module-size policy for agent maintainability (200-500 LOC target, split-on-seams rule)
